word: H4806 - מְרִיא - mᵉrîyʼ - mer-ee' - Fat beast

sections.paragraph:
Original: מריא

Transliteration: merı̂y'

Phonetic: mer-ee'

BDB Definition:

  1. well-fed, fatling

Origin: from H4754 in the sense of grossness, through the idea of domineering (compare H4756)

TWOT entry: 1239a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
